expected_paper_behavior: HOODIE should outperform baselines as arrival probability increases
current_simulator_behavior: Policies frequently tie or collapse to near-identical results across sweeps
likely_root_cause: Sparse workload traces and weak end-to-end policy pressure
recommended_fix: Generate longer active traces with enough queue pressure to separate policies

expected_paper_behavior: Increasing CPU capacity should reduce delay
current_simulator_behavior: Delay often becomes zero or negative-zero in the plotting channel
likely_root_cause: Completion accounting is too sparse; many runs complete no meaningful tasks
recommended_fix: Validate delay on episodes with actual completions before treating zero delay as informative

expected_paper_behavior: Increasing timeout should slightly improve delay
likely_root_cause: Current runtime has limited completion depth and may not propagate timeout effects strongly
recommended_fix: Validate timeout sensitivity on richer traces rather than current degenerate runs

expected_paper_behavior: Drop ratio should vary with arrival probability and policy
current_simulator_behavior: Drop ratio saturates at 100 percent in many sweeps
likely_root_cause: "Episodes usually end with one or zero completions and almost all tasks remain pending"
recommended_fix: Ensure sweeps actually exercise the queue runtime long enough to complete tasks

expected_paper_behavior: CPU capacity should reduce drop ratio
current_simulator_behavior: Drop ratio stays pinned at 100 percent across many CPU values
likely_root_cause: Sweep values are recorded but not producing strong runtime separation
recommended_fix: Verify CPU sweep values are injected into the runtime path and affect execution

expected_paper_behavior: Timeout changes should reduce drop ratio
current_simulator_behavior: Drop ratio remains 100 percent across most timeout values
likely_root_cause: Completion depth is too shallow for timeout variation to matter
recommended_fix: Run longer traces with more completions to expose timeout sensitivity
